claim: A 2022 meta-analysis found urban green spaces reduce ambient temperature by 1-5°C, with the cooling effect extending 100-500 meters, and estimated 2-5 percent heat-mortality reduction per 10 percent green-space increase.

source.title: Urban green space cooling effects: a meta-analysis

method: Reviewed meta-analysis of cooling-effect studies and mortality-attribution methods.
limitations: Cooling-effect varies by climate zone and urban morphology.
Mortality-reduction estimates are modeled, not directly observed.
